title: Minister of Aviation to speak at National Carrier Webinar
description: The Minister of Aviation, Hadi Sirika is billed to speak at a webinar with the theme: “The Dream of National Carrier” whose debut is slated for 2022. The event is scheduled to hold virtual
html:
The Minister of Aviation, Hadi Sirika is billed to speak at a webinar with the theme: “The Dream of National Carrier” whose debut is slated for 2022.

The event is scheduled to hold virtually on Thursday 15th July, 2021, and participants can join the program for an insightful discourse, by registering via the Webinar link – https://bit.ly/Nationalcarrier

Controversy surrounding the question of a national carrier has been on for sometimes with inability of the government to get credible technical partners and investors to support the proposed new national carrier.

The Minister will be addressing the issue at a webinar organised by the National Chamber Policy Centre and the ACCI Transport Trade Group. Sirika will be speaking on the model to adopt which will cover financing and other operational details.

Expected to grace the occasion are the National President, Nigerian Association of Chambers of Commerce, Industry, Mines, and Agriculture (NACCIMA), Abuja Chamber of Commerce and Industry (ACCI), President, Dr. Al-Mujtaba Abubakar, leaders of Chamber movement in Nigeria, aviation stakeholders among others.
